Plugin.Name: NetBird
Plugin.Description:
NetBird is an open-source overlay network built on WireGuard. This plugin runs the official NetBird client as a native Unraid system service, so the host itself becomes a peer on your NetBird network — no Docker container, no extra hop.
Features: - Installs the upstream NetBird Linux binary natively - Persistent config and state on the USB flash drive - Settings, Status, and Info pages under Network Services - Survives reboots; once enabled, auto-starts with the array
